scripts.name: Export DDS
scripts.description: Exports the current Affinity document as a DDS file with BC3/DXT5 compression and auto-generated mipmaps.
scripts.author: jeffthor10

scripts.name: Export DDS (TS4 Normal Map)
scripts.description: Exports the current Affinity document as a DDS normal map file using BC3/DXT5 compression, auto-generated mipmaps, and channel conversions (R->A, G->B, G->R) for use with TS4 CC objects.
scripts.author: jeffthor10
